github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This is a pnpm + Nx monorepo. Always run tasks via `nx` (e.g. `nx run <project>:<task>`). Never call tsc, vite, jest, or other tools directly.
The platform app uses React Router v7 framework mode with SSR. Use loaders, actions, Route.LoaderArgs, and Route.ActionArgs. Follow framework-mode conventions — not SPA patterns.
Use Drizzle ORM for all database access. Schemas are under apps/vectreal-platform/app/db/schema/. Use RLS helpers from apps/vectreal-platform/app/db/schema/rls.ts.
